cotton = {
    method = farming
    category = raw_material
    color = goods_cotton
    default_market_price = 3
    food = 8

    origin_in_old_world = yes
    custom_tags = { old_world_goods textile_goods }
}

stone = {
    category = produced
    color = goods_stone
    default_market_price = 2
}

clay = {
    category = produced
    color = goods_clay
    default_market_price = 1
}

masonry = {
    category = produced
    color = goods_masonry
    default_market_price = 8
}

gems = {
    category = produced
    color = goods_gems
    default_market_price = 10
}

porcelain = {
    category = produced
    color = goods_porcelain
    default_market_price = 3
    transport_cost = 0.5

    demand_add = {
        upper = 0.0005
    }
    demand_multiply = {
        nobles = 20
    }

    development_threshold = 30

    wealth_impact_threshold = {
        all = 1.1
    }
}

    category = produced
}

    category = produced
}

    category = produced
}

    category = produced
}

    category = produced

    category = produced
